pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.
Replace String.format() with String.formatted() for string interpolation.
Replace String.format() with String.formatted() for string interpolation.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Replace the deprecated Locale(String) constructor with the new Locale.of(String) factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: The Locale(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and while it still compiles, the migration recipe enforces the use of the new API to avoid future breakage and deprecation warnings.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Migrate instanceof check to use pattern matching to extract the variable directly.
Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to simplify type checking and variable extraction.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.before:
if (principal instanceof JpaUserDetails) {
			Long userId = ((JpaUserDetails) principal).getUserDbId();
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.after:
if (principal instanceof JpaUserDetails details) {
			Long userId = details.getUserDbId();

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/entity.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/entity.before: return String.format("Entity of type %s with id: %s", this.getClass().getName(), getId());
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/entity.after: return "Entity of type %s with id: %s".formatted(this.getClass().getName(), getId());

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.general_idea: Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.why_exists: The constructor Locale(String) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; while it may still compile with warnings, the migration recipe enforces the use of the new API to ensure forward compatibility and adherence to modern standards.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.general_idea: Replace iterator-based retrieval of the first element with the List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.why_exists: The method List.getFirst() does not exist in Java 17, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.general_idea: Replace iterator().next() with getFirst() to utilize the new Collection API introduced in Java 21.
